team_name: Judge AI  |   From Court Judgments to Verified Action Plans
summary: Build an AI system that can read court judgment PDFs, extract key information, generate a structured action plan, and ensure human-verified data is presented in a dashboard for government use.
optimization_claims: Multi-pass strategy and confidence scoring surface uncertainty rather than hiding it.
OCR on degraded scanned PDFs mitigated by quality gates and clear reviewer notification.
constraints_addressed: Must handle complex, inconsistent legal PDFs
Outputs must be explainable and verifiable
Focus on decision support, not full automation
